notes: La Leche League of Queens chapter Weebly site (volunteer LLL USA–affiliated local group). Cover image is the chapter’s own Weebly header JPEG path, downloaded and re-hosted via POST /api/ingest/upload.
missingOrUncertain: Exact leader email addresses appear Cloudflare-obfuscated on Weebly; use published phone/text for Dawn on the meetings page or the chapter Facebook page for schedule updates.
Some dated library meeting bullets remain on the page; Astoria/LIC Sacred Space series (2nd Wednesday 10:30 a.m.) is the primary recurring in-person anchor described there.
Forest Hills and other Queens meeting series on the same page serve different neighborhoods; this listing documents only the Astoria / LIC infant series at Sacred Space Astoria.

document.name: La Leche League of Queens — Astoria / LIC Infant Meeting
document.description:
Volunteer-led La Leche League of Queens parent-to-parent meetings for breastfeeding, chest-feeding, and mixed feeding. The chapter’s meetings page lists an Astoria / Long Island City infant series that meets in person at Sacred Space Astoria (29-05 21st Avenue) on the second Wednesday of each month at 10:30 a.m., with a reminder to check with Dawn for schedule updates before attending. Expectant parents and support people are welcome; the page notes Zoom groups were on hold and one-on-one helping calls may be available.

Primary leader contact published there: Dawn (she/her), phone 410-991-5673 (text preferred). A Facebook page for the Astoria/LIC circle is linked from the same page for reminders and updates.

Sources: https://lllofqueens.weebly.com/meetings.html https://lllofqueens.weebly.com/
